Notes: Probe how UPDATE processing handles adding an A RR at an owner that already has a CNAME.

Steps.Description: Add an A RR at x.campus.edu., which already owns a CNAME in the initial zone.

Steps.Name: x.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the A was added, ignored, or the CNAME was removed.

Steps.Name: x.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the original CNAME remains after the UPDATE.
